## Edition(s) affected

- [ ] IntelliJ / JetBrains
- [ ] Visual Studio
- [ ] VS Code
- [ ] git-hooks / shared

## Checklist

- [ ] Built the affected edition and tried it against the `examples/` workspace
- [ ] No secret values are logged or written to disk
- [ ] The environment name / project id from config stay validated before reaching the CLI
- [ ] Updated the edition's README / CHANGELOG if behavior changed
- [ ] A user-facing change is mirrored across editions (or an issue tracks the rest)
